## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link related issues, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (lint, build, typecheck, tests, package
      exports)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] A changeset was added (`pnpm changeset`) for any user-facing package
      change
- [ ] TSDoc / docs updated if the public API or behavior changed
- [ ] Commits follow
      [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
